name: agent-commerce-payments-mcp
description: MCP server for agent commerce payments. Features create invoice, process payment, escrow funds. From MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Create an invoice for a commerce transaction with line items, tax, and payment terms.

tools.name: process_payment
tools.description: Process a payment between buyer and seller with fraud checks and fee calculation.

tools.name: escrow_funds
tools.description: Place funds in escrow for a transaction, holding until conditions are met.

tools.name: release_escrow
tools.description: Release escrowed funds to the seller after conditions are verified.

tools.name: payment_history
tools.description: Get payment history for a user or transaction, with filtering and totals.
